fragments.name: oof
fragments.value_flow_notes: OOF blocks SemanticIR/assembly; it may appear in fragment summaries but must not be treated as a capability.
fragments.non_authority_notes: C0 requires evaluating fragment/status/both; live answer remains undecided.
